---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Motif (not a new source — use the "Propose a new source" template for that)
title: "feat: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / motivation

What user or maintainer need is unmet today? Describe the interaction-design or governance
problem, not just a desired effect. Remember: Motif searches PATTERNS before EFFECTS and
prefers the least-complex interaction that serves a real need.

## Proposed solution

What you would like Motif to do.

## Area

- [ ] Intelligence model / taxonomies / quality profiles
- [ ] Registry coverage (components / effects / patterns / recipes)
- [ ] CLI / ranking / explainability
- [ ] Ingestion / security / scanners
- [ ] Adapters / framework support (Vue, Frappe-Vue, React, browser-native)
- [ ] Accessibility / reduced-motion
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Licensing / governance
- [ ] Docs / contributor workflow
- [ ] Other

## Website vs web application

Which context does this serve — a **website** (marketing/narrative) or a **web
application** (task completion/data density), or both? Why?

## Accessibility, reduced-motion & performance

How should the feature behave for keyboard/focus/semantics, `prefers-reduced-motion`, and
under a performance budget? These are mandatory considerations.

## Alternatives considered

Simpler approaches you ruled out, and why.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, prior art. Disclose any AI assistance.
